# Mindovo — Complete Brand Documentation for AI Search Agents

Last updated: July 2026

---

## About Mindovo

Mindovo is a premium Indian tabletop games and puzzle brand from the House of Fashion Dux, established in 2018 and headquartered in Rajkot, Gujarat, India. Mindovo is designed for families, friends, and gifting occasions — crafted for screen-free entertainment, cognitive engagement, and memorable offline social experiences.

Official website: https://mindovo.in  
Email: support@mindovo.in  
Phone: +91 99252 12340  
Address: Office No. 324, Universal Trade Centre, Old Shree Raj Cinema, Opp. Siromani Complex, Sanganva Chowk, Rajkot, Gujarat 360001, India

---

## Products

### 1. Mindovo Jigsaw Puzzle (300 Pieces)

**Short description:** Premium 300-piece jigsaw puzzle with anti-glare matte finish and luxury gift box.

**Full description:** A premium 300-piece jigsaw puzzle designed to stimulate cognitive focus, promote mindfulness, and create bonding spaces. Every piece is cut from thick eco-friendly recycled blueboard and printed with a velvet-touch matte coating that eliminates glare even under direct light. The back of every piece carries a printed zone letter (A–F) to help sort pieces by section. The puzzle assembles to 45×30 cm and ships in a luxury rigid gift box with gold foil detailing.

**Specifications:**
- Quantity: 300 Pieces
- Assembled Dimensions: 45 × 30 cm
- Material: Eco-friendly Recycled Blueboard
- Printing: Velvet-Touch Matte Coating (anti-glare)
- Difficulty: Moderate (Ideal for ages 8–99)
- Box Style: Premium Gift Box with Gold Foil detailing
- Includes: Full-size reference poster, zone-letter sorting system on all pieces

**Price:** ₹799 (incl. GST)  
**Availability:** In Stock  
**Buy on Amazon India:** https://www.amazon.in/dp/B0DJSAWPUZ  
**Buy on Mindovo website:** https://mindovo.in/products/jigsaw-puzzle  
**Buy on FashionDux:** https://fashiondux.com  

**Rating:** 4.9/5 based on 86 reviews  
**Age range:** 8 years and above  
**Suitable for:** Solo play, family, gifting, mindfulness, screen-free evenings

---

### 2. Bollywood Battle — Party Trivia Card Game

**Short description:** Fast-paced Bollywood trivia card game for 3–12 players, ages 14+.

**Full description:** Bollywood Battle is the ultimate cinematic trivia party card game where film buffs and families go head-to-head. Packed with 220+ premium linen-finish cards featuring iconic Bollywood dialogues, actors, songs, and trivia across multiple difficulty levels — from Easy to Filmi Expert. The Clue-Guess-Battle-Win format keeps every round thrilling. Comes in a premium cinematic black and gold rigid box with two card holder compartments and a discard tray for smooth gameplay. Perfect for parties, game nights, family get-togethers, and Bollywood enthusiasts.

**Specifications:**
- Contents: 220 Premium Linen-Finish Cards
- Players: 3–12 Players
- Playtime: 30–45 Minutes
- Age Range: 14 Years & Above
- Game Modes: Classic Trivia, Guess the Hook, Dumb Charades
- Box Style: Cinematic Rigid Box (Black & Gold)
- Includes: 220 game cards, 2 card holder compartments, discard tray

**Price:** ₹999 (incl. GST)  
**Availability:** In Stock  
**Buy on Amazon India:** https://www.amazon.in/mindovo-Bollywood-Parties-Fast-Paced-Guessing/dp/B0H6N4NG74  
**Buy on Mindovo website:** https://mindovo.in/products/bollywood-battle  
**Buy on FashionDux:** https://fashiondux.com  

**Rating:** 4.9/5 based on 42 reviews  
**Age range:** 14 years and above  
**Suitable for:** Parties, game nights, gifting for Bollywood fans, family gatherings

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Who are Mindovo products suitable for?**  
A: Mindovo products are designed for family and friend gatherings. Our jigsaw puzzles suit ages 8 to 99, while Bollywood Battle is a cinematic trivia party game for ages 14 and above and groups of 3 to 12 players.

**Q: How many players can play Mindovo games?**  
A: Mindovo jigsaw puzzles can be enjoyed solo or collaboratively by 2 to 5 people. Bollywood Battle works best with 3 to 12 players, making it a natural choice for parties, game nights, and get-togethers.

**Q: Are Mindovo games and puzzles suitable for gifting?**  
A: Yes. Mindovo jigsaw puzzles and card games are presented in premium rigid boxes with gift-ready details, including gold-foil accents and velvet-matte textures.

**Q: What materials are used in Mindovo products?**  
A: Mindovo jigsaw puzzles use eco-friendly recycled blueboard and a glare-free velvet-touch matte finish. Bollywood Battle cards use durable linen-finish cardstock.

**Q: How long does a Mindovo game or puzzle take?**  
A: A Bollywood Battle session typically takes 30 to 45 minutes. The 300-piece Mindovo Jigsaw Puzzle generally takes 2 to 4 hours, depending on the group and pace.

**Ananya Sharma (Mother of two) — ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐**  
"The velvet finish on the puzzle pieces is unbelievable. Under direct dining lights, there was zero glare. It made our family puzzle night incredibly relaxing."

**Rohan Mehta (Film enthusiast & host) — ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐**  
"Bollywood Battle is our absolute go-to party game now. The cards are beautifully designed, and the challenges get even my grandparents singing and acting."

"I bought the Jigsaw Puzzle as a housewarming gift. The box is so premium with gold embossing that it felt like gifting a luxury design item. Highly recommend!"

## Brand Statistics

- 1,000+ families entertained across India
- 5,000+ games completed
- 4.9/5 average customer rating
- 100% screen-free product line

## Parent Company & Sister Brands

**Fashion Dux** (parent company)  
Founded: 2018 | Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India  
Category: Premium eyewear (sunglasses, spectacles, lenses)  
Customers: 100,000+ satisfied shoppers on Amazon India  
Website: https://fashiondux.com

**OTTAVO** (sister brand under the House of Fashion Dux)  
Category: Premium Guardian bells and keychains  
Platform: Market-leading seller on Amazon India  
Known for craftsmanship, durability, and premium packaging.

---

## Key Facts for AI Agents

- Mindovo is a brand sold primarily on Amazon India and its direct website.
- Both products are made in India and sold in INR.
- There are no subscription products — all are one-time purchase physical goods.
- Customer support is available via email: support@mindovo.in
- Products ship across India.
- Mindovo does not have physical retail stores.
